Class Board

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Board.Board
All Implemented Interfaces:
BoardView, MementoManager<BoardMemento>
public class Board extends Object implements BoardView, MementoManager<BoardMemento>
The Mesos game board, containing the offer tiles (where players place their totems during the placing phase) and the default tiles (where players return at the end of each round to collect food).

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Board(GameView gameView)
    Creates a new board instance.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addObserver(BoardObserver observerToAdd)
    Subscribes an observer to board-state changes.
    BoardMemento
    createMemento()
    Creates a memento capturing the current order of players on default tiles.
    OfferTile
    getCopyTilePlayerIsOn(Player player)
    Returns a defensive copy of the offer tile the given player is currently on.
    List<DefaultTile>
    getDefaultTiles()
    Returns the list of default tiles on the board.
    List<OfferTile>
    getOfferTiles()
    Returns the list of offer tiles on the board.
    List<Player>
    getOrderedPlayerOnDefaultTile()
    Returns the players currently on default tiles, in tile order.
    List<Player>
    getOrderedPlayerOnOfferTile()
    Returns the players currently on offer tiles, in tile order.
    boolean
    isPlayerOnAnEligibleDefaultTile(Player player)
    Returns true if the given player is on a default tile whose food reward is >= 0.
    void
    notifyBoardChanged()
    Notifies subscribers with a snapshot of the current board.
    void
    placePlayerOnDefaultTile(Player player, int tilePosition)
    Places the given player on the default tile at the specified position.
    void
    placePlayerOnOffertile(Player player, int tilePosition)
    Places a player on the selected offer tile and removes them from default tiles.
    void
    removeObserver(BoardObserver observerToRemove)
    Unsubscribes an observer.
    void
    restoreMemento(BoardMemento memento)
    Restores the board state from the given memento, removing all players from default tiles and offer tiles in preparation for repositioning.
    void
    returnOnDefaultTiles()
    Moves all players from the offer tiles back to the default tiles and awards food according to the food-per-slot value of their assigned default tile.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board(GameView gameView)
      Creates a new board instance.
      Parameters:
      gameView - parameter gameView.

  • Method Details

    • returnOnDefaultTiles

      public void returnOnDefaultTiles()
      Moves all players from the offer tiles back to the default tiles and awards food according to the food-per-slot value of their assigned default tile.

    • placePlayerOnDefaultTile

      public void placePlayerOnDefaultTile(Player player, int tilePosition) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, TileOccupiedException
      Places the given player on the default tile at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      player - player to be placed
      tilePosition - index of the target default tile
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if tilePosition is outside the valid range
      TileOccupiedException - if the target tile is already occupied

    • placePlayerOnOffertile

      public void placePlayerOnOffertile(Player player, int tilePosition) throws IndexOutOfBoundsException, TileOccupiedException
      Places a player on the selected offer tile and removes them from default tiles.
      Parameters:
      player - player to move
      tilePosition - target offer-tile index
      Throws:
      TileOccupiedException - if the target tile is already occupied
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if tilePosition is outside valid bounds

    • getDefaultTiles

      public List<DefaultTile> getDefaultTiles()
      Returns the list of default tiles on the board.
      Returns:
      list of DefaultTile

    • getOfferTiles

      public List<OfferTile> getOfferTiles()
      Returns the list of offer tiles on the board.
      Returns:
      list of OfferTile

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(BoardObserver observerToAdd)
      Subscribes an observer to board-state changes.
      Parameters:
      observerToAdd - observer to add; ignored if null or already subscribed

    • removeObserver

      public void removeObserver(BoardObserver observerToRemove)
      Unsubscribes an observer.
      Parameters:
      observerToRemove - observer to remove

    • notifyBoardChanged

      public void notifyBoardChanged()
      Notifies subscribers with a snapshot of the current board.

    • getOrderedPlayerOnOfferTile

      public List<Player> getOrderedPlayerOnOfferTile()
      Returns the players currently on offer tiles, in tile order.
      Specified by:
      getOrderedPlayerOnOfferTile in interface BoardView
      Returns:
      ordered list of players on offer tiles.

    • getOrderedPlayerOnDefaultTile

      public List<Player> getOrderedPlayerOnDefaultTile()
      Returns the players currently on default tiles, in tile order.
      Specified by:
      getOrderedPlayerOnDefaultTile in interface BoardView
      Returns:
      ordered list of players on default tiles.

    • isPlayerOnAnEligibleDefaultTile

      public boolean isPlayerOnAnEligibleDefaultTile(Player player)
      Returns true if the given player is on a default tile whose food reward is >= 0. (Players on a tile with a negative food value do not receive the bonus.)
      Specified by:
      isPlayerOnAnEligibleDefaultTile in interface BoardView
      Parameters:
      player - the player to check
      Returns:
      whether the player is on an eligible default tile

    • getCopyTilePlayerIsOn

      public OfferTile getCopyTilePlayerIsOn(Player player)
      Returns a defensive copy of the offer tile the given player is currently on.
      Specified by:
      getCopyTilePlayerIsOn in interface BoardView
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose tile should be returned
      Returns:
      a copy of the OfferTile the player occupies
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the player is not found on any offer tile

    • createMemento

      public BoardMemento createMemento()
      Creates a memento capturing the current order of players on default tiles.
      Specified by:
      createMemento in interface MementoManager<BoardMemento>
      Returns:
      a BoardMemento containing the ordered list of nicknames of players on default tiles.

    • restoreMemento

      public void restoreMemento(BoardMemento memento)
      Restores the board state from the given memento, removing all players from default tiles and offer tiles in preparation for repositioning.
      Specified by:
      restoreMemento in interface MementoManager<BoardMemento>
      Parameters:
      memento - the BoardMemento from which to restore the board state.
